arts.ttl: Celtic vs Club Brugge LIVE as the power of Parkhead prepares to be unleashed
arts.athr: reporters@dailyrecord.co.uk (Gavin Berry, Ross Pilcher, Jack Herrall)
arts.sum: It's another massive European night under the Parkhead lights in the east end of Glasgow

arts.ttl: Cameron Carter-Vickers pinpoints contributing factors to Auston Trusty's 'fantastic' start at Celtic
arts.sum: Celtic are in Champions League action tonight against Club Brugge and Cameron Carter-Vickers will be needed to steer his side to a defensively sound performance against the Belgian Pro League holders. Speaking yesterday before the Bhoys take on Club Brugge, Carter-Vickers made it clear that Trusty’s powerful attributes have contributed to his ‘fantastic’ start at the heart of the Celtic backline.

arts.ttl: Celtic starlet hits five goals in five UEFA Youth League games
arts.sum: Celtic starlet Daniel Cummings has scored five goals in five matches in European competition this season.

arts.ttl: Ross McCormack says one thing Celtic's Kasper Schmeichel does is the best he's ever seen
arts.sum: Given that Kasper has a legendary father, who played the game and won it all, then it’s probably not easy replicating his footsteps, but he has had an outstanding career to date. Ross McCormack lauds Kasper Schmeichel’s kicking

arts.ttl: Hans Vanaken on how the Club Brugge dressing room is feeling ahead of Celtic Champions League showdown
arts.sum: The stage is set for a dramatic night of Champions League action tonight as Celtic take on Club Brugge at Parkhead. Speaking ahead of leading his side out at Celtic Park, Club Brugge captain Hans Vanaken believes tonight is the ‘least difficult’ on paper for his side to claim Champions League points ahead of clashes against Sporting Clube de Portugal, Juventus and Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Auston Trusty opens up on rise to prominence at Celtic and relationship with Cameron Carter-Vickers
arts.sum: Auston Trusty has proven to be a solid piece of business for Celtic as the United States international continues to show his power alongside Cameron Carter-Vickers in central defence. Auston Trusty on Celtic competition and Cameron Carter-Vickers

arts.ttl: Peter Grant shares disbelief at Celtic star who has had a 'quite incredible' start to the season
arts.sum: Peter Grant continues the Nicolas Kuhn Celtic hype Meanwhile, Nicolas Kuhn and Daizen Maeda are charged with providing the energy in wide areas for either Kyogo Furuhashi or Adam Idah to capitalise on.

arts.ttl: Barry Ferguson amazed by what Celtic trio Kyogo, Reo Hatate and Daizen Maeda do post-match
arts.sum: With that quality comes sheer hard work, especially from someone like Maeda, with the Celtic stars even impressing, Barry Ferguson. Barry Ferguson hails Kyogo, Reo Hatate and Daizen Maeda’s post-match work

arts.ttl: Hope and heartache at core of Club Brugge story
arts.sum: BBC Scotland commentator Liam McLeod profiles Celtic's next Champions League opponents, Club Brugge of Belgium.

arts.ttl: Celtic fans hit out at club for selling virtual sections of Parkhead pitch
arts.sum: Supporters will receive a certificate confirming their ownership of virtual sections of the hallowed turf
